name: Amur Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: courage, the historic banner of Russia, and the strength of the Amur people
the foam of the Amur River and purity
the Amur River, the lakes, and the sky

description: A red upper field above a blue lower field, separated by a narrow white wavy band representing the Amur River.
history: Adopted on 26 April 2007 by the Legislative Assembly of Amur Oblast; the design replaced an earlier 1996 flag and emphasises the oblast's defining feature, the Amur River.

features.symbolism: red represents the courage and strength of the people of Amur; the wavy white band represents the waters of the Amur River; blue represents the river itself and the surrounding sky.
